description: Java Spring Boot app that uses System.out.println() instead of logger.info() — not the vulnerable log4j logging path targeted by CVE-2021-44228. Tree-sitter call-graph analysis determines the vulnerable symbol is not reachable.

findings.human_justification: System.out.println() is used instead of logger.info(). The vulnerable log4j JNDI lookup code path is not reachable from the application.
